---
title: "motif-consensus-v1"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-09"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# Preparation

## Directory
```{r}
working.dir <- "~/EinsteinMed Dropbox/Ronald Cutler/Vijg-lab/Collaborations/Jackson Rogow/transcriptomics/analysis/with-virus-and-stem-loop/batch-2-actin/motif_enrichment/5-consensus"
```

## Libraries
```{r}
library(universalmotif)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(stringr)
library(tibble)
```

# Deduplicate motifs
```{r}
meme_files <- c("streme_w4-8_seed42.txt",
                "streme_w5-7_stringent_seed44.txt",
                "streme_w6-10_seed43.txt")
out_prefix  <- "motifs"
ic_floor    <- 0.5       # drop weak/degenerate motifs
min_overlap <- 6
dup_cut     <- 0.05      # distance cutoff for duplicates (PCC distance = 1 - |r|) -> 0.05 ~ PCC ≥ 0.95
do_trim     <- TRUE

## =========================
## 1) Read + normalize
## =========================
read_safe <- function(f) tryCatch(read_meme(f), error = function(e) list())
motifs <- meme_files %>% map(read_safe) %>% flatten()

# keep only valid objects
motifs <- motifs[vapply(motifs, inherits, logical(1), "universalmotif")]

## strip numeric prefixes in names (cosmetic)
for (i in seq_along(motifs)) {
  nm <- motifs[[i]]@name
  if (nzchar(nm)) motifs[[i]]@name <- str_remove(nm, "^[0-9]+[-_]*")
}

## =========================
## 2) Filter by mean IC
## =========================
mean_ic <- function(m){
  ppm <- sweep(as.matrix(m@motif), 2, pmax(colSums(m@motif), 1e-12), "/")
  H   <- -colSums(ppm * log2(pmax(ppm, 1e-12)))
  mean(2 - H)
}
IC <- vapply(motifs, mean_ic, numeric(1))
motifs <- motifs[IC >= ic_floor]
IC     <- IC[IC >= ic_floor]
stopifnot(length(motifs) >= 2)

# IC plot
df_ic <- tibble(mean_IC = IC)
print(ggplot(df_ic, aes(mean_IC)) + geom_histogram(bins=40) +
        geom_vline(xintercept = ic_floor, linetype=2) +
        labs(title="Mean IC after filtering", x="bits/pos", y="count"))

## =========================
## 3) Fast exact-duplicate removal (hashing)
##    (helps when tools output identical PWMs)
## =========================
hash_pwm <- function(m){
  mat <- round(as.matrix(m@motif), 4)         # round to avoid minor float noise
  paste(c(dim(mat), as.vector(mat)), collapse="|")
}
hashes <- vapply(motifs, hash_pwm, character(1))
first_idx <- !duplicated(hashes)
motifs_exact <- motifs[first_idx]
IC_exact     <- IC[first_idx]

cat(sprintf("[Exact dedup] Removed %d perfect duplicates\n", sum(!first_idx)))

## =========================
## 4) Near-duplicate clustering (PCC)
##    Treat motifs with PCC ≥ 0.95 as duplicates; keep top-IC representative
## =========================
sim <- compare_motifs(motifs_exact, method = "PCC", min.overlap = min_overlap, tryRC = TRUE)
sim <- as.matrix(sim); diag(sim) <- 1
dist_mat <- 1 - abs(sim)

# heatmap to inspect redundancy
rownames(dist_mat) <- colnames(dist_mat) <-
  vapply(motifs_exact, function(m) ifelse(nzchar(m@name), m@name, "motif"), character(1))
pheatmap(1 - dist_mat, cluster_rows = TRUE, cluster_cols = TRUE,
         main = "Similarity (PCC) before near-duplicate collapse")

hc <- hclust(as.dist(dist_mat), method = "average")
plot(hc, main = "Dendrogram (duplicates = tight branches)", xlab = "", sub = "")

dup_clusters <- cutree(hc, h = dup_cut)  # e.g., 0.05 -> PCC >= 0.95
tbl <- tibble(idx = seq_along(motifs_exact),
              name = rownames(dist_mat),
              cluster = dup_clusters,
              IC = IC_exact)

sizes <- count(tbl, cluster, name="size") %>% arrange(desc(size))
print(ggplot(sizes, aes(factor(cluster), size)) + geom_col() +
        labs(title="Near-duplicate cluster sizes", x="Cluster", y="# motifs"))

## Representative selection (highest IC per cluster; tie -> first by name)
rep_idx <- tbl %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = IC, n = 1, with_ties = TRUE) %>%
  arrange(cluster, name) %>%
  slice_head(n = 1) %>%
  pull(idx)

motifs_dedup <- motifs_exact[rep_idx]
cat(sprintf("[Near-duplicate collapse] Representatives kept: %d (from %d)\n",
            length(motifs_dedup), length(motifs_exact)))

## =========================
## 5) Save outputs + mapping
## =========================
# mapping table: every original -> representative
rep_map <- tbl %>%
  mutate(rep_idx = match(cluster, tbl$cluster[rep_idx]),
         representative = tbl$name[rep_idx[match(cluster, tbl$cluster[rep_idx])]]) %>%
  arrange(cluster, desc(IC))

write.csv(rep_map, paste0(out_prefix, "_duplicate_mapping.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write_meme(motifs_dedup, file = paste0(out_prefix, "_deduplicated.meme"))

saveRDS(list(
  motifs_dedup = motifs_dedup,
  mapping      = rep_map,
  sim          = sim,
  dist_mat     = dist_mat,
  hc           = hc,
  IC_kept      = IC_exact
), file = paste0(out_prefix, "_dedup_objects.rds"))

cat(sprintf("\n[Done] Wrote %s_deduplicated.meme and %s_duplicate_mapping.csv\n",
            out_prefix, out_prefix))
```

# Merge similar motifs
```{r, eval = FALSE}
setwd(working.dir)

## ---- user inputs ----
meme_files <- c("streme_w4-8_seed42.txt",
                "streme_w5-7_stringent_seed44.txt",
                "streme_w6-10_seed43.txt")

out_prefix   <- "motif_consensus"
ic_floor     <- 0.5        # mean bits/pos threshold
min_overlap  <- 6          # for compare_motifs()
dist_method  <- "PCC"      # PCC|EUCL|KL|ALLR
linkage      <- "average"
cut_height   <- 0.35       # dendrogram height
do_trim      <- TRUE

## =========================
## 1) Read files safely
## =========================
read_safe <- function(f) {
  mm <- tryCatch(read_meme(f),
                 error = function(e) {message("READ FAIL: ", f, " -> ", e$message); NULL})
  if (is.null(mm)) list() else mm
}

motifs_raw <- meme_files %>% set_names() %>% map(read_safe) %>% flatten()

cat(sprintf("\n[Step 1] Read %d motif objects from %d files\n",
            length(motifs_raw), length(meme_files)))

## Quick check: drop non-universalmotif or NULL
is_um <- vapply(motifs_raw, inherits, logical(1), what = "universalmotif")
motifs_raw <- motifs_raw[is_um]
cat(sprintf("Kept %d valid 'universalmotif' objects\n", length(motifs_raw)))

## =========================
## 2) Validate/normalize objects
##    (fixes the convert_motifs() crash)
## =========================
# Some tools omit alphabet/strand info; set sensible defaults.
# normalize_um <- function(m) {
#   # ensure alphabet
#   if (is.null(m@alphabet) || is.na(m@alphabet) || m@alphabet == "") {
#     # Most MEME/DREME/STREME for UTRs are DNA; switch to "RNA" if your files use U instead of T.
#     m@alphabet <- "DNA"
#   }
#   # ensure type
#   if (is.null(m@type) || is.na(m@type) || m@type == "") m@type <- "PPM"
#   # ensure strand field (not required, but quiets messages)
#   if (is.null(m@strand) || is.na(m@strand) || m@strand == "") m@strand <- "+"
#   # ensure motif matrix numeric, finite, non-empty
#   mat <- as.matrix(m@motif)
#   if (!is.numeric(mat) || any(!is.finite(mat)) || ncol(mat) == 0) {
#     stop("Invalid motif matrix in motif: ", m@name)
#   }
#   m
# }
# 
# motifs_norm <- list()
# bad <- 0
# for (i in seq_along(motifs_raw)) {
#   x <- tryCatch(normalize_um(motifs_raw[[i]]),
#                 error = function(e) {bad <<- bad + 1; message("DROP invalid motif #", i, ": ", e$message); NULL})
#   if (!is.null(x)) motifs_norm[[length(motifs_norm)+1]] <- x
# }
# cat(sprintf("[Step 2] Normalized motifs: %d kept, %d dropped\n", length(motifs_norm), bad))
# 
# stopifnot(length(motifs_norm) >= 2)

## =========================
## 3) Optional trimming of weak flanks
## =========================
# if (do_trim) {
#   motifs_trim <- lapply(motifs_norm, function(m) {
#     tryCatch(trim_motifs(m), error = function(e) m)  # if trimming fails, keep original
#   })
# } else {
#   motifs_trim <- motifs_norm
# }
# cat(sprintf("[Step 3] Trimmed: %d motifs\n", length(motifs_trim)))

## =========================
## 4) Convert to PPM and compute mean IC
## =========================
# convert_motifs() can take a list
motifs_ppm <- tryCatch(convert_motifs(motifs_raw),
                       error = function(e) {
                         message("convert_motifs() failed, trying per-motif conversion: ", e$message)
                         lapply(motifs_raw, function(m) convert_motifs(m, "PPM"))
                       })

mean_ic <- function(m) {
  ppm <- as.matrix(m@motif)
  ppm <- sweep(ppm, 2, pmax(colSums(ppm), 1e-12), "/")
  H   <- -colSums(ppm * log2(pmax(ppm, 1e-12)))
  mean(2 - H) # DNA/RNA max 2 bits/pos
}
IC <- vapply(motifs_ppm, mean_ic, numeric(1))

summary_IC <- summary(IC)
cat("[Step 4] Mean IC summary (bits/pos):\n"); print(summary_IC)

## Plot IC distribution
df_ic <- tibble(idx = seq_along(IC), mean_IC = IC)
p_ic <- ggplot(df_ic, aes(mean_IC)) + geom_histogram(bins = 40) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = ic_floor, linetype = 2) +
  labs(title = "Mean information content per motif", x = "Mean bits/position", y = "Count")
print(p_ic)

## =========================
## 5) Filter by IC
## =========================
keep <- IC >= ic_floor
motifs_kept <- motifs_ppm[keep]
IC_kept <- IC[keep]
cat(sprintf("[Step 5] Kept %d motifs after IC >= %.2f (from %d)\n",
            length(motifs_kept), ic_floor, length(motifs_ppm)))
stopifnot(length(motifs_kept) >= 2)

## =========================
## 6) Pairwise similarity and diagnostics
## =========================
sim <- compare_motifs(motifs_kept, method = dist_method,
                      min.overlap = min_overlap, tryRC = TRUE)
sim <- as.matrix(sim)
diag(sim) <- 1

## Heatmap of similarities
rownames(sim) <- colnames(sim) <-
  vapply(motifs_kept, function(m) ifelse(nzchar(m@name), m@name, "motif"), character(1))

pheatmap(sim, cluster_rows = TRUE, cluster_cols = TRUE,
         main = paste0("Motif similarity (", dist_method, ")"))

## Convert to distance for clustering
dist_mat <- switch(
  dist_method,
  "PCC"  = 1 - abs(sim),
  "EUCL" = { m <- sim; diag(m) <- 0; m },            # EUCL is already a distance
  "KL"   = { m <- max(sim, na.rm=TRUE) - sim; diag(m) <- 0; m },
  "ALLR" = { m <- max(sim, na.rm=TRUE) - sim; diag(m) <- 0; m },
  stop("Unsupported dist_method: ", dist_method)
)
dist_obj <- as.dist(dist_mat)

## Dendrogram
hc <- hclust(dist_obj, method = linkage)
plot(hc, main = sprintf("Clustering (linkage=%s)", linkage), xlab = "", sub = "")

## =========================
## 7) Cut tree → clusters, inspect sizes
## =========================
clusters <- cutree(hc, h = cut_height)
tbl <- tibble(motif = names(clusters), cluster = clusters)
sizes <- count(tbl, cluster, name = "size") %>% arrange(desc(size))
cat("[Step 7] Cluster sizes:\n"); print(sizes, n = nrow(sizes))

## Barplot of cluster sizes
ggplot(sizes, aes(factor(cluster), size)) + geom_col() +
  labs(title = "Cluster sizes", x = "Cluster ID", y = "# motifs")

## =========================
## 8) Build consensus per cluster
## =========================
# merge_motifs() handles orientation/alignment internally
build_consensus <- function(ms, cl_id) {
  cons <- merge_motifs(ms, method = "PCC", tryRC = TRUE)
  cons@name    <- paste0("Cluster_", cl_id, "_n", length(ms))
  cons@altname <- paste0("consensus_", cl_id)
  cons
}

split_idx <- split(seq_along(motifs_kept), clusters)
consensus_list <- lapply(names(split_idx), function(cl) {
  idx <- split_idx[[cl]]
  build_consensus(motifs_kept[idx], cl)
})

cat(sprintf("[Step 8] Built %d consensus motifs\n", length(consensus_list)))

## Quick logo view of consensuses
view_motifs(consensus_list, use.type = "PPM", main = "Consensus motifs")

# heatmap of new consensus motifs
sim <- compare_motifs(consensus_list, method = dist_method,
                      min.overlap = min_overlap, tryRC = TRUE)
sim <- as.matrix(sim)
diag(sim) <- 1

## Heatmap of similarities
rownames(sim) <- colnames(sim) <-
  vapply(consensus_list, function(m) ifelse(nzchar(m@name), m@name, "motif"), character(1))

pheatmap(sim, cluster_rows = TRUE, cluster_cols = TRUE,
         main = paste0("Motif similarity (", dist_method, ")"))

## =========================
## 9) Save outputs and mapping
## =========================
write_meme(consensus_list, file = paste0(out_prefix, ".meme"))

map_table <- tibble(
  motif_name = vapply(motifs_kept, function(m) ifelse(nzchar(m@name), m@name, "motif"), character(1)),
  cluster    = as.integer(clusters),
  consensus  = paste0("Cluster_", clusters)
) %>% arrange(cluster)

write.csv(map_table, paste0(out_prefix, "_mapping.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

saveRDS(list(
  motifs_input   = motifs_raw,
  motifs_ppm     = motifs_ppm,
  motifs_kept    = motifs_kept,
  IC             = IC,
  IC_kept        = IC_kept,
  sim            = sim,
  dist_mat       = dist_mat,
  hc             = hc,
  clusters_tbl   = tbl,
  consensus_list = consensus_list
), file = paste0(out_prefix, "_objects.rds"))

cat(sprintf("\n[Done] Wrote %s_consensus.meme and %s_mapping.csv\n",
            out_prefix, out_prefix))
```
